docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIGUEROA, ADAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIDDIQA, ASHA $4,550.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $4,402.91 INTEREST, $30.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,013.21
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4,402.91 ACCRUED INTEREST, $30.30 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT SIDDIQA, ASHA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIGUEROA, ADAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIDDIQA, ASHA $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR FIGUEROA, ADAN ASSIGNED TO LEE, JAMES LEONARD DBA: JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST
PROOF OF SERVICE OF EJ-195 NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE LEE, JAMES LEONARD DBA: JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST SERVED MAY-25-2017, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT SIDDIQA, ASHA
LEE, JAMES LEONARD IS NO LONGER ASSIGNEE
